scenarioLine: Pick-up time. Another parent turns to you and starts chatting in Dutch.

options.text: Je lacht: 'Sorry, my Dutch is not great.' (You smile and switch to English.)
Je zegt: 'Ja, hè? Lekker weer vandaag.' (You agree and add a weather line.)
Je knikt vriendelijk en hoopt dat het stopt. (You nod kindly and hope it ends.)

reveal: No right answer here. All three are real. If B feels out of reach, it's the smallest win: one weather line and you're in a Dutch conversation. Most parents will happily carry the rest.
